assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend has already been recognised as a foreign-currency-denominated receivable/payable, ie a recognised intragroup monetary item.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The cited IFRS 9 guidance treats a recognised asset or liability as a possible hedged item, and specifically permits foreign currency risk on certain intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The provided authorities identify net investment hedging as the separate IFRS hedge-accounting model for foreign currency exposures arising in consolidated financial statements.
